hints: note: consider replacing with a PCIe or onboard NIC for production HA

vm.swappiness=60 is high for k8s node (recommended: ≤ 10)

insights.message: container "test-crashloop" is crash looping (restarted >5 times)
hints: to inspect: docker inspect test-crashloop | grep -A5 RestartCount

insights.message: host resolv.conf uses 127.0.0.53 (loopback) — containers cannot reach this address
hints: daemon DNS override: not configured (containers fall back to 8.8.8.8)
note: if 8.8.8.8 is blocked by corporate firewall, container DNS fails silently

insights.message: 1 container(s) have docker.sock mounted — grants root-equivalent host access: test-socket
hints: to inspect: docker inspect <name> | grep docker.sock
to fix: remove HostConfig.Binds entry for docker.sock
note: any process inside can escape to host via Docker API

insights.message: 4 running container(s) using root user — reduces container isolation
hints: to fix: add 'USER <non-root>' directive to Dockerfile
to fix: use --user flag: docker run --user 1000:1000 ...

insights.message: 1 container(s) have plaintext secrets in env vars: test-secrets
hints: to fix: use Docker secrets, a vault, or environment variable files
note: env vars are visible in docker inspect and container logs

insights.message: inactive volume group ubuntu-vg is 11% full — no LVs mounted (old OS partition?)
hints: note: this VG has no mounted LVs on this OS — likely a leftover from a previous install

insights.message: volume group vgmint is 98% full (22.1 GB free of 953.4 GB)
SSH allows password authentication — key-based auth recommended
hints: to fix: set PasswordAuthentication no in /etc/ssh/sshd_config

insights.message: SSH LoginGraceTime is 120s — recommend ≤60s to limit unauthenticated connection window
SSH X11Forwarding enabled — unnecessary on servers, increases attack surface
hints: to fix: set X11Forwarding no in /etc/ssh/sshd_config
note: only needed if users require GUI applications over SSH

insights.message: SSH AgentForwarding enabled — if this server is compromised, agent keys on your laptop can be stolen
hints: to fix: set AllowAgentForwarding no in /etc/ssh/sshd_config
note: use ssh -A explicitly when you need forwarding, rather than leaving it on globally

insights.message: SSH idle timeout not set — sessions stay open indefinitely (set ClientAliveInterval)
hints: note: this disconnects idle sessions after 300s × 3 = 15 minutes

insights.message: SSH weak MAC(s) enabled (sshd -T (effective config)): umac-64@openssh.com, hmac-sha1
hints: note: hmac-sha1 uses SHA-1 which is cryptographically broken

insights.message: NOPASSWD sudo for: andrei
password never expires for human account(s): andrei
hints: to fix all: awk -F: '($3>=1000 && $3<65534){print $1}' /etc/passwd | xargs -I{} chage -M 90 {}
note: CIS benchmark recommends maximum password age ≤ 365 days
